sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-09-07 07:48
- Distance: 30.1 km
- Moving time: 3:05:23
- Elapsed time: 3:08:48
- Elevation gain: 282.4 m
- Average heart rate: 163.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 179 bpm
- Average watts: 204.7 W
- Average speed: 9.7 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `12` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `163.4 bpm`, ranging from `156.1` to `169.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `160.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `165.9 bpm` (+4.9 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.3 spm`, with a working range of `108.1` to `210.0 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `175.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `169.5 spm` (-5.6 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:10 /km` across `30.055 km` in `3:05:23` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:46 /km` and second-half pace was `6:34 /km` (+48 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `163.2 bpm` average and `179 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `160.8 bpm` in the first half and `165.3 bpm` in the second (+4.5 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `3:05:23` out of `3:08:48` elapsed (98.2%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `8` stop segments and `1.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `332.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.6 m` and `71.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `141.0 m` in the first half and `191.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
